name: Repo Ops Lens
description: A repo audit panel that turns a GitHub link into a crisp operating brief, risk pass, and next-step suggestion.
short_description: A repo audit panel that turns a GitHub link into a crisp operating brief, risk pass, and next-step suggestion.
default_prompt: Use $repo-ops-lens to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a repo audit panel that turns a github link into a crisp operating brief, risk pass, and next-step suggestion.
detail_lines: Takes a repository URL and reduces it to what matters next.
Makes risk and architecture notes visible without a long read.
Builds a clean bridge between research and action.
